opportunities: Create comprehensive beginner guide with simple analogies and examples
Target high-volume, low-difficulty keyword (8100 volume, 0.24 difficulty)
Focus on definitional content as primary search intent
Include practical examples to differentiate from existing generic definitions
Address related questions like 'SEO nasıl yapılır?' and 'SEO ne işe yarar?'
Leverage question-answer format that users expect
Build content cluster around SEO basics for Turkish audience
gaps: Most results focus on technical guides rather than simple explanations
Lack of real-world analogies to explain SEO concepts
Missing step-by-step beginner approach in existing content
No clear distinction between different SEO types for beginners
Limited practical examples showing before/after scenarios
Absence of common SEO myths and misconceptions section
